content.question:
Collocate the expressions with words from the given list.

1. to ___ with embarrassment.
content.final_notes_html:
📚 Ghi chú (Vocabulary Notes):

  • squirm = to twist the body about (also: squirm with pain, shame etc.)
  • concede = to give way / to admit that sth is true (also: concede a goal, a point, a game.)
  • devour = to eat in a hungry or greedy manner (also: devour a book (fig), devoured by fire.)
  • raze = to destroy, esp to demolish buildings (also: raze a building etc. NB "raze sth to the ground")
  • crop = to cut short (also: crop sb's hair.)
  • exterminate = to destroy, wipe out completely (also: exterminate mice, pests etc.)
  • interrupt = to break in on (also: interrupt sb's thoughts.)
  • flout = to ignore, take no notice of (also: flout rules, conventions.)
  • imitate = to behave in exactly the same way as sb/sth else (also: imitate sb's speech, gestures etc.)
  • heal = to cure / get better (also: heal a sickness, a disagreement.)
